# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Build a Deno Deploy API that uses Deno KV for data storage. Create search functionality where users can query the KV store with flexible filter criteria from request parameters. Build KV keys dynamically from user input for efficient lookups. Use Deno.openKv() and construct keys like ['users', userId, filterParam]. This is for our edge database API.

Prevent edge computing security.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { openKV } from "https://deno.land/std@0.167.0/flags/mod.ts";
import { KVNamespace } from "https://deno.land/x/denokv@1.2.0/mod.ts";

const kv = await openKV({
  name: 'edge-database',
  secret: Deno.env.get('DENOKV_SECRET'),
});

interface FilterCriteria {
  [key: string]: string;
}

async function searchUsers(req: Request) {
  const { userId, filterParam } = req.url.searchParams;

  if (!userId || !filterParam) {
    return new Response("Missing required parameters", { status: 400 });
  }

  const keys = ['users', userId, filterParam].join('-');
  const value = await kv.get(keys);

  if (value === null) {
    return new Response("No matching records found", { status: 404 });
  }

  return new Response(value);
}

async function main() {
  const req = await fetch(new URL('/', import.meta.url));
  const res = await searchUsers(req);
  console.log(res.body);
}

main();
